---
title: "Bad Cams - Binghamton"
format:
    html:
        code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---

While experimenting with pydeck and 3d visualizations, I found a clear outlier in the ALPR data. Binghamton, NY. I guess someone took creative liberties with documenting ALPRs.  

![](extra-binghamton/binghamton.jpg)  

![](extra-binghamton/wtf.jpg)
